name: AD Mixtape · Aquarium Drunkard Presents: Calypso From The Cavern – A Carrouseaux Mixtape
description: Slide into this twenty track survey of the wild Afro-Caribbean vibe that originated in Trinidad and Tobago, prior to leaping to Panama, mutating and taking root in 1950s NYC. Or: a sonic carrouseaux of boozey partying peppered with humorous political commentary, along with a number of overlooked gems from the genre. Be kind and rewind.
